name: X
author: Lumia Stream
description: Create and delete X posts with your own developer tokens, sync account variables, and trigger polling-based alerts for mentions and follower growth.
keywords: x, twitter, social, posts, mentions, followers

settings.label: Consumer Key
settings.helperText: From your X app's Keys and tokens page.

settings.label: Consumer Secret
settings.helperText: From your X app's Keys and tokens page.

settings.label: Access Token
settings.helperText: User access token generated for your X app.

settings.label: Access Token Secret
settings.helperText: User access token secret generated for your X app.

settings.label: Expected Username
settings.helperText: Optional safety check. If set, Lumia will warn when the token belongs to a different account.

settings.label: Enable Alerts
settings.helperText: Master switch for all background X alert polling. Leave this off to avoid background read usage.

settings.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings.helperText: How often to refresh profile, mentions, and follower totals when alerts are enabled.

settings.label: Follower Alerts
settings.helperText: Trigger Lumia alerts when follower count increases. Disabled by default to avoid background read usage.

settings.label: Mention Alerts
settings.helperText: Trigger Lumia alerts for new mentions and replies found in the mention timeline. Disabled by default to avoid background read usage.

settings.label: Latest Post Timeline
settings.helperText: Choose whether the latest-post variables should ignore replies.

settings.label: Debug Logs
settings.helperText: Writes extra X API diagnostics to the Lumia plugin log.

actions.label: Create Post
actions.description: Create a text, reply, quote, image, or video post on X.

fields.label: Media
fields.helperText: Optional. Choose one local file or enter one https URL. Images and mp4/webm/mov video are supported.

actions.label: Delete Post
actions.description: Delete a specific X post by ID.

actions.label: Delete Latest Created Post
actions.description: Delete the last post created by this plugin session, or the latest saved post if available.

actions.label: Like Post
actions.description: Like a post on behalf of the authenticated user.

actions.label: Repost Post
actions.description: Repost a post on behalf of the authenticated user.

actions.label: Follow User
actions.description: Follow a user by handle or numeric user ID.

variables.name: user_id
variables.description: Authenticated X user ID.

variables.name: username
variables.description: Authenticated X handle without @.

variables.name: display_name
variables.description: Authenticated X display name.

variables.name: bio
variables.description: Current account bio/description.

variables.name: verified
variables.description: Whether the authenticated account is verified.

variables.name: followers_count
variables.description: Current follower count from X public metrics.

variables.name: following_count
variables.description: Current following count from X public metrics.

variables.name: listed_count
variables.description: Current listed count from X public metrics.

variables.name: post_count
variables.description: Current post count from X public metrics.

variables.name: latest_post_id
variables.description: Most recent authored post ID seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_post_text
variables.description: Text of the most recent authored post seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_post_url
variables.description: URL of the most recent authored post seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_post_created_at
variables.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent authored post seen by the plugin.

variables.name: last_created_post_id
variables.description: Most recent post ID created by the plugin via an action.

variables.name: latest_mention_id
variables.description: Most recent mention ID seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_mention_text
variables.description: Text of the most recent mention seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_mention_author
variables.description: Author handle of the most recent mention seen by the plugin.

variables.name: latest_mention_url
variables.description: URL of the most recent mention seen by the plugin.

variables.name: follower_delta
variables.description: Follower increase detected during the last polling cycle.

variables.name: last_action_status
variables.description: Short success status from the last executed action.

variables.name: last_action_error
variables.description: Last action error message, if any.
